visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man wearing a light blue cap, glasses, and a white t-shirt is seen in an underground parking lot. He walks toward a white car and interacts with a charging cable plugged into the vehicle's side port. The environment is well-lit with fluorescent lights reflecting off the white concrete columns. Yellow subtitles appear at the bottom. (2) The camera switches to a close-up of a black charging station unit with a digital screen displaying power metrics. A green laser-like graphic points to the screen. The brand logo 'MyCharge' is prominent on the device. (3) The man stands in front of the white car, gesturing with his hands as he speaks directly to the camera. He wears a string of wooden beads on his right wrist. The background shows rows of parked cars in the dim distance. (4) A series of instructional graphics and mobile phone screen captures are shown. The screens display the 'USPACE' app interface, QR codes, and maps. Handheld shots show the man's thumb navigating the touch screen. (5) Close-up shots of the car's charging port reveal the metallic pins of the connector. The man's hands are shown plugging and unplugging the cable. (6) The man returns to a medium shot, holding his smartphone and smiling. He continues to speak with animated facial expressions, pointing his finger for emphasis. Variety-style text overlays with bold red and yellow colors appear periodically around him. (7) Final shots show the charging port again, followed by the man delivering a closing statement to the camera with a thumbs-up gesture.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 欸老闆！老闆！. (2) [Subtitle]: 嘿？幹嘛？. (3) [Subtitle]: (充電槍這樣插著？) 你就這樣走掉喔？. (4) [Subtitle]: 你還不知道喔？. (5) [Logo]: MyCharge. [Slogan]: 隨插即充的功能. (6) [Subtitle]: 台灣大哥大MyCharge推出了隨插即充的功能. (7) [Subtitle]: 你只要完成第一次綁定. (8) [Subtitle]: 全台任何一個站點. (9) [Logo]: 台灣大哥大 MyCharge. [Subtitle]: 之後都可以直接插上充電槍. (10) [Subtitle]: 就可以充電了. (11) [Subtitle]: 離開時拔槍 手機就會自動跳出. (12) [Subtitle]: 這是一次結單通知. (13) [Slogan]: 第一個全面支援 隨插即充. (14) [Subtitle]: AC充電樁. (15) [Subtitle]: 僅需首次綁定 相關步驟我現在馬上教你. (16) [Variety]: 手把手教學step1. [Subtitle]: 第一步先把充電槍插上去. (17) [Variety]: 手把手教學step2. [Subtitle]: 它跳出一個QRcode對不對. (18) [Variety]: 手把手教學step3. [Subtitle]: 現在拿出手機掃描. (19) [Variety]: 手把手教學step4. [Subtitle]: 開始註冊. (20) [Variety]: 手把手教學step5. [Subtitle]: 這時我的手機就會跳出：我要充電. (21) [Variety]: 手把手教學step6. [Subtitle]: 啟用充電！. (22) [Variety]: 手把手教學step7. [Subtitle]: 綁定隨插即充. (23) [Variety]: 手把手教學step8. [Subtitle]: 新增你的車輛. (24) [Variety]: 手把手教學step9. [Subtitle]: 是不是超快. (25) [Subtitle]: 星級飯店啊、商辦啊、量販店啊、全台好多. (26) [Slogan]: 都有站點. (27) [Slogan]: 搜尋MyCharge充電服務. (28) [Slogan]: 6/30以前綁定 隨插即充. (29) [Slogan]: 還送30元充電金. (30) [Subtitle]: 申辦5G的指定專案. (31) [Subtitle]: 送你3個月USPACE訂閱服務.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing a light blue denim-style cap, black-rimmed glasses, a white t-shirt with a 'Canada Roots' logo, and blue jeans.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An underground concrete parking garage with white pipes running across the ceiling, structural columns painted with white and yellow stripes, and several parked cars in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a male voice shouting 'Boss! Boss!' in an excited, high-pitched tone, accompanied by an upbeat, mid-tempo electronic pop track. (2) A second male voice responds with a casual 'Huh? What's up?' as the BGM maintains a steady, rhythmic beat. (3) A digital 'ding' SFX triggers a transition to a faster-paced narration explaining the 'MyCharge' service. The narrator's voice is energetic and clear. (4) Frequent UI 'click' and 'pop' SFX are heard every few seconds as the narrator explains technical steps. (5) The BGM continues throughout, providing a positive, energetic backdrop to the continuous speech delivery. (6) A final 'whoosh' SFX accompanies the closing statement and call to action.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Intro -> Step-by-Step Tutorial -> Benefits -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote the 'MyCharge' electric vehicle charging service by Taiwan Mobile, highlighting its 'plug and charge' feature. It uses a helpful tutorial format to demonstrate how easy it is to set up the service for first-time users.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is specifically teaching how to use a branded service (MyCharge) and mentions promotional benefits like charging credits.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-energy social media promotional video with frequent text overlays and clear instructions for EV owners.
